name: Apple Siri (including Shortcuts)
short_description: Apple's voice assistant, built into iPhone, HomePod, Watch, and Mac, with the Shortcuts app for user-defined automations.
long_description: Siri is a speech-driven assistant that ships across Apple's devices, letting people send messages, set timers, control smart-home accessories, and query information by voice. Through the Shortcuts app it also exposes a visual automation layer so users can chain actions across apps and devices. As an ambient, voice-first agent embedded in everyday hardware, Siri is a defining example of how disembodied AI threads into the physical routines of daily life.

images.caption: The Siri interface invoked on macOS Ventura.
images.alt_text: A screenshot of the Siri assistant window open on a Mac desktop, showing the colorful Siri orb above a prompt inviting the user to ask something.

sources.title: Siri
sources.access_notes: Background and history; Siri integrated into iPhone 4S on October 4, 2011.

interactions.title: Call for help without touching the phone
interactions.description: Say "Hey Siri, call Victoria" while pinned, fallen, or unable to reach the screen, and the unlocked phone places the call hands-free. A 70-year-old stroke victim used exactly this line to reach his daughter after crawling for two days.

interactions.title: An NFC tag that runs your evening
interactions.description: Tap your phone to a sticker by the bed and a Shortcuts automation fires: lights dim, alarm sets, Do Not Disturb on. The Shortcuts app turns physical triggers like NFC tags, arriving home, or a time of day into chained actions across apps and accessories.

interactions.title: Ask the downstairs speaker a question
interactions.description: From the kitchen HomePod, say "Ask downstairs, has anyone seen my keys?" and Siri relays your recorded voice to the speaker in that room, with replies coming back the same way.

interactions.title: Arriving-home routine that knows the time
interactions.description: Cross the threshold after sunset and a single "Arrive" automation switches on the lights and warms the den heater, but stays quiet during daylight. People wire these conditional homecomings in Shortcuts to skip the wall switches entirely.

interactions.title: A custom app on the Home Screen that is really a script
interactions.description: Save a multi-step shortcut as a Home Screen icon with its own name and artwork, so tapping a "Coffee" tile silently runs a chain of actions that looks like launching an app.

interactions.title: The assistant kids forget to thank
interactions.description: Because Siri answers a barked command with no expectation of "please," researchers and parents worry it quietly normalizes curt speech in young children, prompting rival assistants to add politeness-rewarding modes.

interactions.title: Narrate a medication round by voice
interactions.description: A caregiver with hands full could say "Hey Siri, log Dad's 2pm dose" and have a Shortcut append the entry to a shared note or reminder, building on Siri's speech input and Shortcuts' app-chaining rather than any new sensor.
